review_policy: below auto threshold, missing canonical id, or ambiguous context goes to resolver_review_queue
safety_rules: Never use uncertain mappings for model training
Store confidence for every suggested mapping
Prefer missing data over false merges
Corrections must be possible without mutating original raw snapshots
dangerous_separations: shots and shots on target are different
1x2 regulation and to qualify are different
player shots and team shots are different
total corners and team corners are different
ci_policy: local deterministic smoke only; no API keys, no provider calls, no website automation
